name: Naabil's Grecian Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lean stewing beef, cut into 1 ½-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the beef, onions, and garlic in oil; drain excess fat.
2. Transfer the mixture to the Crock-Pot.
3. Parboil eggplant in 2 cups boiling, salted water for 2 minutes; drain. Add to the beef mixture and stir well.
4. Combine beef broth with cinnamon, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Pour into the Crock-Pot and stir well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
6. One hour before serving, stir in garbanzos, tomato wedges, and Kitchen Bouquet.
7. Serve over fluffy rice sprinkled with mint.
